task: Build before/after comparison view for agent runs
result: Implemented comparison view for agent runs with RunHistoryDropdown, SuggestionDiffView (unified and side-by-side modes), and integration into AgentSuggestionsPanel. Features include per-agent run selection, lazy-loaded previous run suggestions, color-coded change indicators (added/removed/modified/unchanged), and tab switching between suggestions and comparison views. PR #2187 opened.
